_comment: Mock Google OAuth2 token exchange responses — returned by POST oauth2.googleapis.com/token
_usage: Use in tests that mock the code-for-token exchange step.

invalid_grant_error._comment: Returned when code is expired, already used, or invalid

invalid_client_error._comment: Returned when client_id or client_secret is wrong
invalid_client_error.error_description: The OAuth client was not found.

redirect_uri_mismatch_error._comment: Returned when redirect_uri does not match registered URI

token_exchange_request._comment: Reference shape for the POST body sent to Google
